title: Hand-offs Functional & Monitored

scope.rationale: 8 files affected: 3 new frontend components, new hook, new service, 2 backend endpoints. Moderate scope for new feature.

integration.rationale: Single data source: .aiox/handoffs/ directory. No external APIs. Filesystem read only.

infrastructure.rationale: Backend service reads and parses YAML files from .aiox/handoffs/. Straightforward file I/O.

knowledge.rationale: Requires understanding handoff YAML format. Pattern is similar to 3.11 (file reading + YAML parsing). Team familiar.

risk.rationale: Low risk. Read-only filesystem access. Graceful error handling if directory missing. Non-critical feature.

reasoning: SIMPLE-to-STANDARD (9/25 pts). File reading similar to 3.11 (Stories). Timeline visualization adds slight complexity. Depends on 3.13 approval. Can run in parallel with 3.15.
recommendation: Schedule after 3.13. Relatively simple compared to other Wave 5 stories. Can run in parallel with 3.15. Pattern matches 3.11 (file reading + YAML parsing).
